task_completion.description: Navigate to the Leads module and initiate the import process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vtiger CRM interface showing the 'Import Leads' screen or the initial file selection step for importing.

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file upload field or file selection dialog showing 'tradeshow_leads.csv' selected.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV columns to the corresponding CRM Lead fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The import mapping screen showing CSV headers mapped to CRM fields: First Name, Last Name, Company, Email, Phone, City, State, Lead Source, and Description.

task_completion.description: Successfully import the leads as indicated by a summary screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import result or summary screen showing that 8 records were successfully imported or created.

task_completion.description: Ensure all 8 leads appear in the Leads list view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Leads list view in Vtiger CRM displaying the newly imported leads (e.g., Dominguez, Oyelaran, Kowalski) with their respective companies and 'Trade Show' listed under the Lead Source column.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface rather than terminal commands or direct database injection.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser with Vtiger CRM open and interacted with, rather than a terminal window executing MySQL or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the bulk import feature rather than manually creating leads one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the 'Import' wizard screens (file selection, mapping, import result) rather than multiple 'Add Lead' individual form submissions.

integrity.description: The results are displayed in the genuine Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM UI elements (menus, sidebars, URL bar showing the correct local CRM address) are visible in the final list view, not a manipulated HTML file or spreadsheet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file is located at /home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_leads.csv. Exactly 8 leads should be imported. The expected leads have the following Last Name and Company pairs: Dominguez (Greenfield Landscaping LLC), Oyelaran (BrightPath Solar Inc), Kowalski (Apex Property Management), Nwosu (Harbor Freight Logistics), Chakraborty (Sunrise Home Health Services), Whitfield (Summit Roofing Contractors), Ferreira (Coastal Realty Group), Al-Rashidi (Pinnacle IT Solutions). The Lead Source for all these leads is 'Trade Show'.
